title: Place value blocks within 1,000
description: Practice using place value blocks to represent numbers within 1000.

hints: $923=9\text{ hundreds}+2\text{ tens}+3\text{ ones}$

So, we need to show $9$ hundreds, $2$ tens, and $3$ ones with the place value blocks.

![9, one-hundred-cube flats, labeled 900. 2, ten-cube rods, labeled 20. 3 unit cubes, labeled 3.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/80bb437feb8f24e3d7c05f0f1a0c25ac642ecf4d)

This place value model shows $923$:

![9, one-hundred-cube flats. 2, ten-cube rods. 3 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/051b1e902b6ff7cefe1cd04bcfed06e1c264c0e5)

choices.content: ![9, one-hundred-cube flats. 2, ten-cube rods. 3 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/051b1e902b6ff7cefe1cd04bcfed06e1c264c0e5)
![2, one-hundred-cube flats. 3, ten-cube rods. 9 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/23d638d949ae10b7630a6d9d024b933fef176a01)
![9, one-hundred-cube flats. 3, ten-cube rods. 2 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/138bfe482a59f51305db26d23a3df7c5b10c248e)

hints: $485=4\text{ hundreds}+8\text{ tens}+5\text{ ones}$

So, we need to show $4$ hundreds, $8$ tens, and $5$ ones with the place value blocks.

![4, one-hundred-cube flats, labeled 400. 8, ten-cube rods, labeled 80. 5 unit cubes, labeled 5.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d64678e3031d68a4f7d88309ca6f81c632ddf7c2)

This place value model shows $485$:

![4, one-hundred-cube flats. 8, ten-cube rods. 5 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bec4669ea89b6cac29071e508ef67988b3739a33)

choices.content: ![4, one-hundred-cube flats. 8, ten-cube rods. 5 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bec4669ea89b6cac29071e508ef67988b3739a33)
![5, one-hundred-cube flats. 8, ten-cube rods. 4 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c0e041056563d9be618817a9958cc63d1146225c)
![4, one-hundred-cube flats. 5, ten-cube rods. 8 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a00fe5a485b766c1434f29b733cd5b2e70b78b62)

hints: $270=2\text{ hundreds}+7\text{ tens}$

So, we need to show $2$ hundreds and $7$ tens with the place value blocks.

![2, one-hundred-cube flats, labeled 200. 7, ten-cube rods, labeled 70.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f8e27e90538fc63c5ba58868faf96b730fe86749)

This place value model shows $270$:

![2, one-hundred-cube flats. 7, ten-cube rods.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1fd1bb277af0031e30538fa6ddb62ab746b106bb)
$806=8\text{ hundreds}+6\text{ ones}$

So, we need to show $8$ hundreds and $6$ ones with the place value blocks.

![8, one-hundred-cube flats, labeled 800. 6 unit cubes, labeled 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc9de4b8577b0f7718ecd340eb2f7bbc78195c3d)

This place value model shows $806$:

![8, one-hundred-cube flats. 6 unit cubes.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d1cc335cc8aab09a7e6f28494fe17dd5aa4992be)

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is shown by the place value blocks?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ff5cfb71bd833fb180f573ae40e4b6bdd3321e50)

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
The place value blocks show $5$ hundreds and $4$ ones: 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/423555a270f76ca0847815eac2398b284201d78a)
The place value blocks show $504$.
